interfaces.name: GameState
interfaces.signature: struct GameState: Codable, Equatable { var schemaVersion: Int; var resources: ResourceBundle; var creatures: [Creature]; var currents: [CurrentUpgrade]; var unlockedBiomes: Set<BiomeID>; var streak: StreakState; var lastSeenDate: Date; var hasCompletedFirstLaunch: Bool }
interfaces.notes: Single canonical Codable blob persisted atomically. schemaVersion drives SchemaMigration. All timestamps are Date, never derived from Date() inside this type.

interfaces.name: ResourceBundle
interfaces.signature: struct ResourceBundle: Codable, Equatable { var light: Double; var nutrients: Double; var drift: Double; var driftPerMinute: Double }
interfaces.notes: Drift is soft currency shown in ResourcePill. driftPerMinute is derived/cached, recomputed whenever currents change.

interfaces.name: Creature
interfaces.signature: struct Creature: Codable, Identifiable, Equatable { let id: CreatureID; var speciesID: SpeciesID; var level: Int; var acquiredDate: Date; var isDiscovered: Bool }
interfaces.notes: SpeciesID keys into a static SpeciesCatalog (bundled JSON/plist), not persisted per-instance.

interfaces.name: SpeciesCatalog
interfaces.signature: struct SpeciesEntry: Codable, Identifiable { let id: SpeciesID; let displayName: String; let biome: BiomeID; let voiceOverDescription: String; let unlockRequirement: UnlockRequirement }
interfaces.notes: Static content bundled with the app; Almanac and ReefCanvas both read this to resolve a Creature's visuals/VoiceOver label.

interfaces.name: CurrentUpgrade
interfaces.signature: struct CurrentUpgrade: Codable, Identifiable, Equatable { let id: CurrentID; var isPurchased: Bool; var tier: Int }
interfaces.notes: Position along the flowing current-line is derived UI layout, not stored here.

interfaces.name: BiomeID / CreatureID / SpeciesID / CurrentID
interfaces.signature: struct BiomeID: Codable, Hashable, RawRepresentable { let rawValue: String } // same pattern for CreatureID, SpeciesID, CurrentID
interfaces.notes: Typed IDs everywhere instead of bare String/UUID to prevent cross-domain mixups across lanes.

interfaces.name: StreakState
interfaces.signature: struct StreakState: Codable, Equatable { var currentStreak: Int; var lastClaimDate: Date?; var isClaimableToday: Bool }
interfaces.notes: isClaimableToday is computed by StreakEngine at read time, not trusted as stored truth across days.

interfaces.name: DateProvider
interfaces.signature: protocol DateProvider { func now() -> Date }; struct SystemDateProvider: DateProvider { func now() -> Date { Date() } }; struct FixedDateProvider: DateProvider { let date: Date; func now() -> Date { date } }
interfaces.notes: Injected into ReefStore and every economy function. FixedDateProvider is the unit-test seam from the architecture review.

interfaces.name: OfflineGrowthCalculator
interfaces.signature: enum OfflineGrowthCalculator { static func compute(state: GameState, elapsed: TimeInterval) -> WelcomeBackPayload }
interfaces.notes: Pure function, no Date() calls internally. Clamps negative elapsed to 0 and caps elapsed at maxCatchUpInterval (7-14 days). Reused verbatim by any future WidgetKit timeline provider.

interfaces.name: WelcomeBackPayload
interfaces.signature: struct WelcomeBackPayload: Equatable { let updatedState: GameState; let resourcesGained: ResourceBundle; let newCreatures: [Creature]; let wasFirstReturn: Bool; let elapsedClamped: Bool }
interfaces.notes: elapsedClamped tells the WelcomeBackSheet whether to show a soft 'capped' framing instead of a raw multi-week number.

interfaces.name: StockingDensityCurve
interfaces.signature: enum StockingDensityCurve { static func visibleSpriteCount(ownedCount: Int, cap: Int) -> Int; static func vitality(ownedCount: Int) -> Double }
interfaces.notes: visibleSpriteCount log-scales and is hard-capped (~32-40) so ReefCanvas draw cost stays constant regardless of progression; vitality (0...1) drives particle density/glow alpha for the excess.

interfaces.name: UpgradeCostCurve / StreakEngine
interfaces.signature: enum UpgradeCostCurve { static func cost(for current: CurrentID, tier: Int) -> ResourceBundle }; enum StreakEngine { static func evaluate(streak: StreakState, now: Date) -> StreakState }
interfaces.notes: StreakEngine.evaluate handles the exactly-one-day vs grace-window boundary the architecture round called out; called with DateProvider.now(), never Date() directly.

interfaces.name: ReefStore
interfaces.signature: @MainActor @Observable final class ReefStore { private(set) var state: GameState; var presentedSheet: PresentedSheet?; init(initialState: GameState, persistence: PersistenceService, clock: DateProvider, store: StoreKitManaging); func handleScenePhaseChange(_ phase: ScenePhase, now: Date); func purchaseCurrent(_ id: CurrentID); func stirPool(); func claimDailyTide() }
interfaces.notes: Single canonical engine injected via .environment(). All mutation goes through its methods; views never mutate GameState directly.

interfaces.name: PresentedSheet
interfaces.signature: enum PresentedSheet: Identifiable, Equatable { case welcomeBack(WelcomeBackPayload); case dailyTide; case deepCurrent(DeepCurrentContext); case settings; case error(AppError); var id: String { ... } }
interfaces.notes: Single shared presentation contract so exactly one sheet can be active at a time; lives in data_domain so all lanes build against a stable case list rather than any one lane owning it.

interfaces.name: PersistenceService
interfaces.signature: protocol PersistenceService { func load() throws -> GameState?; func save(_ state: GameState) async throws }
interfaces.notes: Concrete impl: JSON-encode off the main actor from a copied value-type snapshot, write to temp file, atomic rename into Application Support. SchemaMigration runs inside load().

interfaces.name: SchemaMigration
interfaces.signature: enum SchemaMigration { static let currentVersion: Int; static func migrate(rawData: Data, fromVersion: Int) throws -> GameState }
interfaces.notes: Switch-statement migration chain, exercised even at schemaVersion 1 so v2 never requires a rewrite.

interfaces.name: StoreKitManaging
interfaces.signature: protocol StoreKitManaging { var entitlement: Entitlement { get }; func products() async throws -> [Product]; func purchase(_ product: Product) async throws -> PurchaseResult; func restorePurchases() async throws; func observeTransactionUpdates() -> AsyncStream<Entitlement> }
interfaces.notes: StoreKit 2 backed. observeTransactionUpdates wraps Transaction.updates so mid-session family-sharing revocation is reflected, per architecture decision.

interfaces.name: Entitlement / PurchaseResult
interfaces.signature: enum Entitlement: Equatable { case free; case deepCurrentActive(expiresAt: Date?) }; enum PurchaseResult { case success; case userCancelled; case pending; case failed(AppError) }
interfaces.notes: Entitlement gates Almanac/Currents locked states and DeepCurrent screen content.

interfaces.name: NotificationScheduler
interfaces.signature: protocol NotificationScheduler { func requestAuthorization() async -> UNAuthorizationStatus; func scheduleIdleReminder(after: TimeInterval); func currentAuthorizationStatus() async -> UNAuthorizationStatus }
interfaces.notes: Invoked contextually (post first Daily Tide claim), never on launch. Settings reads currentAuthorizationStatus() to render notDetermined/denied/authorized/provisional states.

interfaces.name: AppError
interfaces.signature: enum AppError: Error, Equatable { case persistenceFailed; case storeKitUnavailable; case networkUnavailable; case purchaseFailed(String) }
interfaces.notes: Shared error surface so every lane's error-state UI switches over the same cases instead of ad hoc strings.

interfaces.name: AppTab
interfaces.signature: enum AppTab: String, CaseIterable, Identifiable { case reef, almanac, currents, depths; var id: String { rawValue } }
interfaces.notes: Drives the persistent bottom TabView; each case owns an independent NavigationStack/path.

interfaces.name: ReefCanvas
interfaces.signature: struct ReefCanvas: View { let creatures: [Creature]; let vitality: Double; let reduceMotion: Bool; var body: some View }
interfaces.notes: TimelineView(.animation(paused: reduceMotion))-driven Canvas; bounded draw count via StockingDensityCurve.visibleSpriteCount; Reduce Motion swaps drift for slow opacity pulse per design handoff.

interfaces.name: ResourcePill / TideProgressBar / CurrentNode
interfaces.signature: struct ResourcePill: View { let resources: ResourceBundle }; struct TideProgressBar: View { let progress: Double }; struct CurrentNode: View { let upgrade: CurrentUpgrade; let state: CurrentNodeVisualState }
interfaces.notes: CurrentNode's tap target must be >=44pt via padding independent of visual node size, per design handoff accessibility requirement.

interfaces.name: CurrentNodeVisualState
interfaces.signature: enum CurrentNodeVisualState: Equatable { case affordable; case unaffordable; case purchased; case dormant }
interfaces.notes: Maps to the theme-consistent 'dormant' locked treatment the design handoff requires instead of generic grayed-opacity.

interfaces.name: SpeciesEntry
interfaces.signature: struct SpeciesEntry: Codable, Identifiable { let id: SpeciesID; let displayName: String; let biome: BiomeID; let voiceOverDescription: String; let unlockRequirement: UnlockRequirement }
interfaces.notes: Static content bundled with the app; Almanac and ReefCanvas both read this to resolve a Creature's visuals/VoiceOver label.

interfaces.name: TypedIDs
interfaces.signature: struct BiomeID: Codable, Hashable, RawRepresentable { let rawValue: String } // identical pattern for CreatureID, SpeciesID, CurrentID
interfaces.notes: Typed IDs everywhere instead of bare String/UUID to prevent cross-domain mixups across lanes.

interfaces.name: UpgradeCostCurve
interfaces.signature: enum UpgradeCostCurve { static func cost(for current: CurrentID, tier: Int) -> ResourceBundle }
interfaces.notes: Pure cost curve used by ReefStore.purchaseCurrent and CurrentNode's unaffordable-preview UI.

interfaces.name: StreakEngine
interfaces.signature: enum StreakEngine { static func evaluate(streak: StreakState, now: Date) -> StreakState }
interfaces.notes: Handles exactly-one-day vs grace-window streak boundary from the architecture review; called with DateProvider.now(), never Date() directly.

interfaces.name: Entitlement
interfaces.signature: enum Entitlement: Equatable { case free; case deepCurrentActive(expiresAt: Date?) }
interfaces.notes: Gates Almanac/Currents locked states and DeepCurrent screen content.

interfaces.name: PurchaseResult
interfaces.signature: enum PurchaseResult { case success; case userCancelled; case pending; case failed(AppError) }
interfaces.notes: Drives DeepCurrent's purchase-in-progress/success/failure UI states.

interfaces.name: ResourcePill
interfaces.signature: struct ResourcePill: View { let resources: ResourceBundle }
interfaces.notes: Translucent capsule at top of Reef; must pass Dynamic Type per design handoff's tightest-layout callout.

interfaces.name: TideProgressBar
interfaces.signature: struct TideProgressBar: View { let progress: Double }
interfaces.notes: Fills/recedes like a tide rather than a linear gradient bar, per design handoff.

interfaces.name: CurrentNode
interfaces.signature: struct CurrentNode: View { let upgrade: CurrentUpgrade; let state: CurrentNodeVisualState }
interfaces.notes: Tap target must be >=44pt via padding independent of visual node size, per design handoff accessibility requirement.
